criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users, session length, and retention rates.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, in-app analytics tools, and third-party market intelligence platforms.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as chatbots, recommendation engines, and natural language processing.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and expert analysis.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and the number of reviews on app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and feedback.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store listings.

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The originality and creativity of the app's features and user experience, setting it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, tech blogs, and industry awards.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's privacy policies and security measures to protect user data.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, and user feedback.
